description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that automates the build, test, and release process for a project. The workflow triggers on push to any branch or tag matching v*.* , snapshot-* , or tptlibsdev-* and on pull requests to any branch. It consists of three jobs: prepare, build, and publish, and release. The prepare job sets up the environment, installs dependencies, and generates outputs for the build matrix and release information. The build job uses the generated matrix to build the project on different platforms, and the publish and release jobs handle publishing and releasing the project based on the prepare job's outputs.
